name: io.github.josanku/k-stay
description: Korean tourism, lodging, and culture data for AI tools — 50,000+ verified listings (legal homestays 외도민업, hanok 한옥, hotels, hostels, temple stays, festivals, K-Culture hotspots, inbound tourism stats). Sourced from Korean government open data (행정안전부·KTO·문화재청). 16 tools, free, MIT.
